rationale: Reconfirmed at SHA 18b2624a. Round-1 (d327cdce) → round-2 delta is exactly +85 lines to internal/panel/panel_test.go, ZERO deletions — the sole change is the additive test TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues; all prod code (create.go, panel.go, panel.go Gate field) is byte-identical. Byte-identity-when-absent holds: `json:"gate,omitempty"` unchanged, and TestPanelCreate_GateOmittedByteIdentical + TestCreate_StampsGate/gate_omitted PASS. The three 112 pins (GateFieldDecisionInert, DecisionIsPanelGateDecision, ExitCodeTracksDecision) are untouched by the delta and PASS. Full pinned suite `go test ./internal/panel ./cmd/mindspec -run 'GateField|DecisionIsPanelGateDecision|ExitCodeTracksDecision|Byte|StampsGate|AllEnumValues' -v` is green. My round-1 APPROVE stands.
findings: Round-1→round-2 delta: internal/panel/panel_test.go +85/-0, purely additive; prod code byte-identical.

New test TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues extends the inert-Gate pin across all five real enum values (spec_approve/plan_approve/bead/final_review/adhoc) plus empty, over Allow and Block scenarios — strengthens coverage without altering behavior.
112 pins TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert, TestPanelVerbs_DecisionIsPanelGateDecision, TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision UNMODIFIED and green.
Gate field retains json:"gate,omitempty"; omission stays byte-identical to the pre-113 field set (112 R9 contract preserved).
Full pinned test subset green in both internal/panel and cmd/mindspec.
